---
title: "Welcome to my page!"
about: 
    template: jolla
    image: "headshot.JPG"
    links:
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/graceeevans5/
    - icon: instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/grace3vans/ 
---

## About Me
My name is Grace Evans and I am an International Relations major with a Data Science minor at the **College of William & Mary**. I am passionate about the intersection of digital technology and global governance, particularly how Generative AI can be leveraged to enhance outcomes for underserved populations.

I currently serve as a Research Assistant at the **Digital Inclusion & Governance Lab**.
